---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

::: page-header
# Research & Publications
:::

::: jump-nav
[Current focus](#current-research-focus){.jump-link}
[Supervisory team](#supervisory-team){.jump-link}
[Publications](#publications){.jump-link}
[Peer review](#peer-review){.jump-link}
[Recent reading](#recent-reading){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current research focus

Write a paragraph describing your current research focus. What questions are you trying to answer? What methods do you use? What population or context does your work apply to?

```{=html}
<!-- PhD Timeline — reads from /data/timeline.json -->
<div class="tl-legend">
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot done"></span> Completed</div>
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot wip"></span> In progress</div>
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot todo"></span> Not started</div>
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot goal"></span> Goal</div>
  <div class="tl-est-badge" id="tl-est-badge">
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="5.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M8 4.5v4l2.5 1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
    <span id="tl-est-year"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="phd-timeline" id="phd-timeline">
  <p class="pub-loading">Loading timeline…</p>
</div>

<div class="tl-milestones-footer" id="tl-milestones-footer"></div>

<script>
(function() {
  const TOTAL_QS = 16;
  const PAPER_COLORS = { 1: '#2d7a4f', 2: 'var(--accent)', 3: 'var(--navy)', 0: 'var(--text-muted)' };
  const STATUS_COLORS = { done: '#2d7a4f', wip: '#c05a4a', todo: '#6b6560', goal: '#2d7aee' };

  function overallStatus(statuses) {
    const vals = Object.values(statuses);
    if (vals.every(v => v === 'done')) return 'done';
    if (vals.includes('wip')) return 'wip';
    if (vals.includes('todo')) return 'todo';
    return 'goal';
  }

  function dotSvg(status, size) {
    size = size || 7;
    const c = STATUS_COLORS[status];
    if (status === 'done') return `<svg width="${size+4}" height="${size+4}" viewBox="0 0 14 14"><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="6" fill="${c}" opacity="0.15"/><path d="M4 7.2L6.2 9.4L10 4.6" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>`;
    if (status === 'wip') return `<span style="width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;background:${c};display:inline-block;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px ${c}20;"></span>`;
    if (status === 'goal') return `<span style="width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px dashed ${c};display:inline-block;"></span>`;
    return `<span style="width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid ${c};display:inline-block;opacity:0.5;"></span>`;
  }

  function renderBar(activity, paperColor, container) {
    const entries = Object.entries(activity.statuses).map(([q,s]) => [parseInt(q), s]).sort((a,b) => a[0]-b[0]);
    const minQ = entries[0][0], maxQ = entries[entries.length-1][0];
    const left = ((minQ - 1) / TOTAL_QS) * 100;
    const width = ((maxQ - minQ + 1) / TOTAL_QS) * 100;

    const track = document.createElement('div');
    track.className = 'tl-bar-track';
    track.style.cssText = `left:${left}%;width:${width}%;background:color-mix(in srgb, ${paperColor} 15%, transparent);`;
    container.appendChild(track);

    entries.forEach(([q, sym]) => {
      const dotLeft = (maxQ === minQ) ? left + width/2 : left + ((q - minQ) / (maxQ - minQ)) * width;
      const dot = document.createElement('div');
      dot.className = 'tl-bar-dot';
      dot.style.left = dotLeft + '%';
      dot.innerHTML = dotSvg(sym, 8);
      container.appendChild(dot);
    });
  }

  async function init() {
    const container = document.getElementById('phd-timeline');
    const footerEl = document.getElementById('tl-milestones-footer');

    let data;
    try {
      const res = await fetch('/data/timeline.json');
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
      data = await res.json();
    } catch {
      container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;padding:1rem;">Could not load timeline.</p>';
      return;
    }

    const currentQ = data.currentQuarter;
    document.getElementById('tl-est-year').textContent = 'Est. ' + data.estimatedCompletion;

    const milestoneMap = {};
    (data.milestones || []).forEach(m => { milestoneMap[m.quarter] = m; });

    let headerHtml = '<div class="tl-header"><div class="tl-header-label">Activity</div><div class="tl-quarters">';
    for (let q = 1; q <= TOTAL_QS; q++) {
      const ms = milestoneMap[q];
      const cur = q === currentQ;
      headerHtml += `<div class="tl-q${cur ? ' is-current' : ''}">`;
      if (ms) headerHtml += `<span class="tl-q-milestone">${ms.label}</span>`;
      headerHtml += `Q${q}`;
      if (cur) headerHtml += '<div class="tl-q-marker"></div>';
      headerHtml += '</div>';
    }
    headerHtml += '</div></div>';
    container.innerHTML = headerHtml;

    data.papers.forEach(paper => {
      const color = PAPER_COLORS[paper.id] || 'var(--text-muted)';
      const completed = paper.activities.filter(a => overallStatus(a.statuses) === 'done').length;
      const total = paper.activities.length;
      const pct = Math.round((completed / total) * 100);

      const section = document.createElement('div');
      section.className = 'tl-paper';

      const header = document.createElement('div');
      header.className = 'tl-paper-header';
      header.innerHTML = `
        <div class="tl-paper-info">
          <div class="tl-paper-bar" style="background:${color};"></div>
          <div class="tl-paper-meta">
            <div class="tl-paper-label" style="color:${color};">${paper.label}</div>
            <div class="tl-paper-title">${paper.title}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-paper-right">
            <span class="tl-paper-frac">${completed}/${total}</span>
            <div class="tl-paper-progress" style="background:color-mix(in srgb, ${color} 15%, transparent);">
              <div class="tl-paper-progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%;background:${color};"></div>
            </div>
            <svg class="tl-chevron" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M4 6l4 4 4-4" stroke="var(--navy)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-gantt-summary"></div>
      `;

      const summaryEl = header.querySelector('.tl-gantt-summary');
      const curLine = document.createElement('div');
      curLine.className = 'tl-current-line';
      curLine.style.left = ((currentQ - 0.5) / TOTAL_QS * 100) + '%';
      summaryEl.appendChild(curLine);

      paper.activities.forEach(act => {
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.className = 'tl-mini-row';
        row.style.position = 'relative';
        renderBar(act, color, row);
        summaryEl.appendChild(row);
      });

      section.appendChild(header);

      const activitiesDiv = document.createElement('div');
      activitiesDiv.className = 'tl-activities';
      activitiesDiv.style.display = 'none';

      paper.activities.forEach(act => {
        const os = overallStatus(act.statuses);
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.className = 'tl-activity';

        const label = document.createElement('div');
        label.className = 'tl-activity-label' + (os === 'done' ? ' is-done' : '');
        label.innerHTML = dotSvg(os, 7) + ' ' + act.desc;

        const cell = document.createElement('div');
        cell.className = 'tl-gantt-cell';

        for (let g = 1; g < TOTAL_QS; g++) {
          const gl = document.createElement('div');
          gl.className = 'tl-gridline';
          gl.style.left = ((g / TOTAL_QS) * 100) + '%';
          cell.appendChild(gl);
        }
        const cl = document.createElement('div');
        cl.className = 'tl-current-line';
        cl.style.left = ((currentQ - 0.5) / TOTAL_QS * 100) + '%';
        cell.appendChild(cl);

        renderBar(act, color, cell);
        row.appendChild(label);
        row.appendChild(cell);
        activitiesDiv.appendChild(row);
      });

      section.appendChild(activitiesDiv);

      header.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const open = activitiesDiv.style.display !== 'none';
        activitiesDiv.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block';
        header.classList.toggle('expanded', !open);
        header.querySelector('.tl-chevron').classList.toggle('open', !open);
      });

      container.appendChild(section);
    });

    if (data.milestones) {
      footerEl.innerHTML = data.milestones.map(m =>
        `<div class="tl-milestone-foot"><div class="tl-milestone-foot-label">${m.label}</div><div class="tl-milestone-foot-full">${m.full}</div></div>`
      ).join('');
    }
  }

  init();
})();
</script>
```

::: paper-grid
::: paper-card
[Paper 1]{.paper-label}

### Paper title or type

Brief description of this paper — its aim, methods, and what it contributes.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 2]{.paper-label}

### Paper title or type

Brief description of this paper — its aim, methods, and what it contributes.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 3]{.paper-label}

### Paper title or type

Brief description of this paper — its aim, methods, and what it contributes.
:::
:::

## Supervisory team

::: supervisor-row
[Supervisor Name](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000){.supervisor-link} [Co-supervisor Name](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000){.supervisor-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
/* Publications layout */
.pub-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
.pub-main { min-width: 0; }
.pub-sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 80px;
}
.sidebar-section {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.1rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.sidebar-label {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.sidebar-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}
.sidebar-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
}
.sidebar-link:hover {
  background: var(--tag-bg);
  border-color: var(--navy);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.pub-year-head {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border);
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
}
.pub-entry-block {
  padding: 1rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.pub-entry-block:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
.pub-favicon {
  width: 32px; height: 32px;
  border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg); flex-shrink: 0;
  object-fit: contain; padding: 3px; margin-top: 2px;
}
.pub-favicon-fallback {
  width: 32px; height: 32px;
  border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg); flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.pub-entry-text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.pub-title-link {
  font-size: 0.97rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important; text-decoration: none !important;
  line-height: 1.55; display: inline;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  background-image: linear-gradient(var(--accent), var(--accent));
  background-size: 0% 1px; background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: left bottom;
  transition: background-size 0.25s ease, color 0.15s;
}
.pub-title-link:hover { color: var(--accent) !important; background-size: 100% 1px; }
.pub-journal-link {
  display: inline; font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--text-muted) !important; font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 400; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  text-decoration: none !important; transition: color 0.15s;
}
.pub-journal-link:hover { color: var(--accent) !important; }
.pub-meta-row {
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem; margin-top: 0.4rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.pub-cite-btn {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.18rem 0.6rem; cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.6;
}
.pub-cite-btn:hover {
  background: var(--tag-bg); border-color: var(--navy);
  color: var(--navy); transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.pub-cite-btn.copied { background: #e8f5ee; border-color: #2d7a4f; color: #2d7a4f; }
.pub-loading { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-muted); padding: 1rem 0; }
.pub-section-heading {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0;
}
.pub-footer-row {
  margin-top: 1.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 1rem;
}
.pub-synced-note { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.02em; }
.pub-synced-note a { color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: underline; }
.pub-scholar-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important; text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.85rem; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px; transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s;
}
.pub-scholar-link:hover { background: var(--tag-bg); border-color: var(--navy); }
.peer-review-section { margin-top: 2rem; padding-top: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.peer-review-section h2 { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
@media (max-width: 860px) { .pub-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .pub-sidebar { display: none; } }
</style>

<div class="pub-layout">

  <div class="pub-main">
    <h2 id="publications" class="pub-section-heading">Publications</h2>
    <div id="orcid-pubs">
      <p class="pub-loading">Loading publications from ORCID…</p>
    </div>
    <div class="peer-review-section">
      <h2 id="peer-review">Peer review</h2>
      <p>Optional: list journals you review for, or remove this section.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-section">
      <span class="sidebar-label">Find me online</span>
      <div class="sidebar-links">
        <a href="https://orcid.org/YOUR-ORCID-ID" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOURID" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Your-Name" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
// ─── UPDATE THESE TWO LINES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
const ORCID_ID   = 'YOUR-ORCID-ID';          // e.g. '0000-0000-0000-0000'
const SCHOLAR_URL = 'https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOURID';
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const MAX_PUBS = 6;

const DOI_DOMAINS = {
  '10.1016': 'elsevier.com', '10.1007': 'springer.com', '10.1038': 'nature.com',
  '10.1186': 'biomedcentral.com', '10.1002': 'wiley.com', '10.1111': 'wiley.com',
  '10.1080': 'tandfonline.com', '10.4324': 'routledge.com', '10.1037': 'apa.org',
  '10.1027': 'hogrefe.com', '10.1177': 'sagepub.com', '10.1093': 'oup.com',
  '10.1017': 'cambridge.org', '10.1371': 'plos.org', '10.1136': 'bmj.com',
  '10.3389': 'frontiersin.org', '10.3390': 'mdpi.com', '10.1521': 'guilford.com',
  '10.1159': 'karger.com', '10.1515': 'degruyter.com', '10.1108': 'emerald.com',
};

async function fetchJournalUrl(doi) {
  if (!doi) return null;
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(doi)}?mailto=youremail@institution.edu`, { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } });
    if (!res.ok) return null;
    const data = await res.json();
    const work = data?.message;
    if (!work) return null;
    const issns = work.ISSN || [];
    const publisher = (work.publisher || '').toLowerCase();
    if (issns.length > 0) {
      const issn = issns[0];
      if (publisher.includes('elsevier') || publisher.includes('sciencedirect')) {
        const m = doi.match(/10\.1016\/j\.([a-z]+)\./);
        if (m) return `https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/${m[1]}`;
        return `https://www.sciencedirect.com/search?qs=&pub=${encodeURIComponent(work['container-title']?.[0] || '')}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('springer') || publisher.includes('nature')) return `https://link.springer.com/search?query=&search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=${issn}`;
      if (publisher.includes('wiley')) return `https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/${issn.replace('-','')}`;
      if (publisher.includes('taylor') || publisher.includes('routledge') || publisher.includes('informa')) return `https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/${issn}`;
      if (publisher.includes('sage')) return `https://journals.sagepub.com/home/${issn}`;
      if (publisher.includes('oxford') || publisher.includes('oup')) { const slug = (work['container-title']?.[0] || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-'); return `https://academic.oup.com/${slug}`; }
      if (publisher.includes('american psychological') || publisher.includes('apa ')) return `https://www.apa.org/pubs/journals/${issn}`;
      if (publisher.includes('frontiers')) { const slug = (work['container-title']?.[0] || '').toLowerCase().replace('frontiers in ','').replace(/\s+/g,'-'); return `https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/${slug}`; }
    }
    return null;
  } catch { return null; }
}

function getBookSvg() { const c = (window.CCM_COLORS && window.CCM_COLORS.accent) || '#c8922a'; return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>`; }

function pubIconHtml(doi) {
  const domain = doi ? (DOI_DOMAINS[doi.split('/')[0]] || null) : null;
  if (domain) return `<img class="pub-favicon" src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=${domain}&sz=64" alt="${domain}" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex';"/><div class="pub-favicon-fallback" style="display:none;">${getBookSvg()}</div>`;
  return `<div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div>`;
}

function formatAuthorsApa(contributors) {
  if (!contributors || contributors.length === 0) return '';
  const names = contributors.filter(c => c.role === 'author' || !c.role).map(c => {
    const credit = c['credit-name']?.value || '';
    if (!credit) return null;
    const parts = credit.trim().split(/\s+/);
    if (parts.length >= 2) { const last = parts[parts.length - 1]; const initials = parts.slice(0, -1).map(p => p[0].toUpperCase() + '.').join(' '); return `${last}, ${initials}`; }
    return credit;
  }).filter(Boolean);
  if (names.length === 0) return '';
  if (names.length <= 20) return names.join(', ');
  return names.slice(0, 19).join(', ') + ', … ' + names[names.length - 1];
}

function makeApaPlain(w) {
  const authors = w.authors || '';
  const doi = w.doi ? `https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '';
  const vol = w.volume ? `, ${w.volume}` : '';
  const issue = w.issue ? `(${w.issue})` : '';
  const pages = w.pages ? `, ${w.pages}` : '';
  const journal = w.journal ? `${w.journal}${vol}${issue}${pages}. ` : '';
  return `${authors}${authors ? ' ' : ''}(${w.year}). ${w.title}. ${journal}${doi}`;
}

function makeRis(w) {
  const authorLines = (w.authors || '').split(', ').filter(Boolean).map(a => `AU  - ${a}`).join('\r\n');
  return ['TY  - JOUR', authorLines, `TI  - ${w.title}`, w.journal ? `JO  - ${w.journal}` : '', w.year ? `PY  - ${w.year}` : '', w.volume ? `VL  - ${w.volume}` : '', w.issue ? `IS  - ${w.issue}` : '', w.pages ? `SP  - ${w.pages}` : '', w.doi ? `DO  - ${w.doi}` : '', w.doi ? `UR  - https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '', 'ER  - '].filter(Boolean).join('\r\n');
}

const PUB_WORKS = [];

function copyApa(idx) {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(makeApaPlain(PUB_WORKS[idx])).then(() => {
    const btn = document.getElementById(`cite-btn-${idx}`);
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Copied!'; btn.classList.add('copied'); setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Copy APA 7'; btn.classList.remove('copied'); }, 2000); }
  });
}

function downloadRisById(idx) {
  const w = PUB_WORKS[idx];
  const blob = new Blob([makeRis(w)], { type: 'application/x-research-info-systems' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url; a.download = w.title.slice(0, 40).replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase() + '.ris'; a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

function renderWorks(works, fromOrcid) {
  PUB_WORKS.length = 0;
  works.forEach(w => PUB_WORKS.push(w));
  const byYear = {};
  works.forEach(w => { const y = w.year || 'n.d.'; if (!byYear[y]) byYear[y] = []; byYear[y].push(w); });
  let html = ''; let idx = 0;
  for (const year of Object.keys(byYear).sort((a, b) => b - a)) {
    html += `<span class="pub-year-head">${year}</span>`;
    for (const w of byYear[year]) {
      const articleHref = w.doi ? `https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '#';
      const jUrl = w.journalUrl || articleHref;
      const i = idx++;
      html += `<div class="pub-entry-block">${pubIconHtml(w.doi)}<div class="pub-entry-text"><a href="${articleHref}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${w.title}</a><div class="pub-meta-row">${w.journal ? `<a href="${jUrl}" target="_blank" class="pub-journal-link">${w.journal}</a>` : ''}<button id="cite-btn-${i}" class="pub-cite-btn" onclick="copyApa(${i})">Copy APA 7</button><button class="pub-cite-btn" onclick="downloadRisById(${i})">Download RIS</button></div></div></div>`;
    }
  }
  const footer = document.createElement('div');
  footer.className = 'pub-footer-row';
  footer.innerHTML = (fromOrcid ? `<span class="pub-synced-note">Synced from <a href="https://orcid.org/${ORCID_ID}" target="_blank">ORCID</a> · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-AU',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'})}</span>` : `<span class="pub-synced-note">Showing recent publications</span>`) + `<a href="${SCHOLAR_URL}" target="_blank" class="pub-scholar-link">View all on Google Scholar →</a>`;
  return { html, footer };
}

async function fetchFullWork(putCode, doi) {
  const [orcidResult, jUrl] = await Promise.all([
    (async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/work/${putCode}`, { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } });
        if (!res.ok) return null;
        const data = await res.json();
        const contributors = data?.contributors?.contributor || [];
        return {
          authors: formatAuthorsApa(contributors),
          volume:  data?.['biblio']?.volume || null,
          issue:   data?.['biblio']?.issue  || null,
          pages:   data?.['biblio']?.['start-page'] ? (data['biblio']['end-page'] ? `${data['biblio']['start-page']}–${data['biblio']['end-page']}` : data['biblio']['start-page']) : null,
        };
      } catch { return null; }
    })(),
    fetchJournalUrl(doi),
  ]);
  return { authors: orcidResult?.authors || null, volume: orcidResult?.volume || null, issue: orcidResult?.issue || null, pages: orcidResult?.pages || null, journalUrl: jUrl || null };
}

async function loadOrcidPublications() {
  const container = document.getElementById('orcid-pubs');
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/works`, { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    const data = await res.json();
    const summaries = [];
    for (const group of data.group || []) {
      const summary = group['work-summary']?.[0];
      if (!summary) continue;
      const title = summary.title?.title?.value || 'Untitled';
      const year  = parseInt(summary['publication-date']?.year?.value) || 0;
      const journal = summary['journal-title']?.value || '';
      let doi = null;
      for (const eid of summary['external-ids']?.['external-id'] || []) { if (eid['external-id-type'] === 'doi') { doi = eid['external-id-value']; break; } }
      summaries.push({ title, year, journal, doi, putCode: summary['put-code'] });
    }
    if (summaries.length === 0) throw new Error('empty');
    summaries.sort((a, b) => b.year - a.year);
    const top = summaries.slice(0, MAX_PUBS);
    const fullRecords = await Promise.all(top.map(s => fetchFullWork(s.putCode, s.doi)));
    const works = top.map((s, i) => ({ ...s, authors: fullRecords[i]?.authors || null, volume: fullRecords[i]?.volume || null, issue: fullRecords[i]?.issue || null, pages: fullRecords[i]?.pages || null, journalUrl: fullRecords[i]?.journalUrl || (s.doi ? `https://doi.org/${s.doi}` : null) }));
    const { html, footer } = renderWorks(works, true);
    container.innerHTML = html;
    container.appendChild(footer);
  } catch {
    // Fallback: replace this with your own papers once you have publications
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="pub-loading">No publications found. Add your papers to your ORCID profile and make sure your profile is set to public.</p>';
  }
}

loadOrcidPublications();
</script>
```

## Recent reading

Papers you've read recently — collaborator work, methodological references, and things worth knowing about. Update the list in `data/reading.json`.

```{=html}
<div id="reading-list"><p class="pub-loading">Loading…</p></div>

<script>
(async function() {
  const MAX_READING = 5;
  const container = document.getElementById('reading-list');

  let entries = [];
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/data/reading.json');
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    entries = await res.json();
  } catch {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Could not load reading list.</p>';
    return;
  }

  if (!entries.length) {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Nothing here yet.</p>';
    return;
  }

  const shown = entries.slice(0, MAX_READING);
  const rest  = entries.slice(MAX_READING);

  function getBookSvg() { const c = (window.CCM_COLORS && window.CCM_COLORS.accent) || '#c8922a'; return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>`; }

  async function fetchMeta(e) {
    if (e.title) return { title: e.title, journal: e.journal || '', year: e.year || '', authors: e.authors || '', url: `https://doi.org/${e.doi}` };
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(e.doi)}?mailto=youremail@institution.edu`);
      if (!res.ok) return null;
      const data = await res.json();
      const w = data.message;
      const authors = (w.author || []).slice(0, 5).map(a => { const last = a.family || ''; const init = a.given ? a.given[0] + '.' : ''; return `${last}, ${init}`.trim().replace(/,$/, ''); }).join(', ') + ((w.author || []).length > 5 ? ', et al.' : '');
      return { title: w.title?.[0] || 'Untitled', journal: w['container-title']?.[0] || '', year: w.published?.['date-parts']?.[0]?.[0] || '', authors, url: `https://doi.org/${e.doi}` };
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  function renderCard(meta, note, doi) {
    const url = meta ? meta.url : `https://doi.org/${doi}`;
    const title = meta ? meta.title : doi;
    const journal = meta ? [meta.authors, meta.year, meta.journal].filter(Boolean).join(' · ') : '';
    return `<div class="pub-entry-block"><div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div><div class="pub-entry-text"><a href="${url}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${title}</a>${journal ? `<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.2rem;font-style:italic;">${journal}</div>` : ''}${note ? `<div style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.35rem;line-height:1.6;">${note}</div>` : ''}</div></div>`;
  }

  const metas = await Promise.all(shown.map(e => fetchMeta(e)));
  let html = shown.map((e, i) => renderCard(metas[i], e.note, e.doi)).join('');

  if (rest.length) {
    const restMetas = await Promise.all(rest.map(e => fetchMeta(e)));
    const restHtml = rest.map((e, i) => renderCard(restMetas[i], e.note, e.doi)).join('');
    html += `<div id="reading-more" style="display:none;">${restHtml}</div><button onclick="document.getElementById('reading-more').style.display='block';this.style.display='none';" class="pub-cite-btn" style="margin-top:0.75rem;">Show ${rest.length} more</button>`;
  }

  container.innerHTML = html;
})();
</script>
```
